ingredients_text: Hummus 85% [cooked chickpeas 53% (chickpeas, water), water, rapeseed oil, Tahini 10%, spirit vinegar, mixed spices, acidity regulator: citric acid], sauce 15% [pickled red pepper 72% (red pepper, salt, acidity regulators (citric acid, acetic acid)), tomato sauce 10% (sliced tomatoes (tomatoes, tomato juice, salt, acidity regulator: citric acid), water, sugar, pickled onion (onion, salt), pickled red pepper 4% (red pepper, spirit vinegar, sugar, salt), spirit vinegar, modified starch, salt, spices, acidity regulator: citric acid), rapeseed oil, tomato concentrate 4%, spirit vinegar, spice extracts, cumin, chili flakes , caraway, dried onion, ground chili, _sesame].
